title: "The Elder Shall Serve The Younger" Genesis 25:19-26

notes.introduction: An exposition of Genesis 25:19-26 on the birth of Jacob and Esau, tracing the supplication of Isaac and Rebekah, the divine oracle of two nations, and the prophetic declaration that the elder shall serve the younger. The passage is read through two lenses: the historical conflict between the Israelites and the Edomites, and a spiritual application drawn from the symbolism of two natures in the believer.
themes: the old man and the new man
